---
output: md_document
title: "Posts written for Warwick PhD Life Blog"
abstract: Between 2022 and 2024, I had written for Warwick PhD Life Blog. I shared experience about learning programming as a sociologist, wrote about the benefits of open science and transitioning to the PhD among other things.
authors: 
- admin
date: "2024-01-01"
featured: false
links:
- name: Blog posts
  url: https://doctorallife.wordpress.com/?s=greta
share: false
profile: true
---
